hypothesis: If large language models (particularly more capable models like o4-mini) are prompted with domain-specific in-context examples of increasing complexity, then they will achieve higher precision, recall, and F1-scores in extracting PROV-DM-compliant provenance graphs from materials synthesis literature compared to zero-shot prompting or less capable models, because structured examples guide the model to correctly identify and format synthesis entities, activities, and their relationships according to the provenance schema.
